mapper.sql: a.id, a.accid, a.status, a.pay_time as payTime, a.create_time as createTime, b.openid, b.partner_trade_no as partnerTradeNo, b.payment_no as paymentNo, b.err_code_des as errCodeDes, b.err_code as errCode, b.result_code as resultCode, b.return_msg as returnMsg, b.amount, b.return_code as returnCode, d.phone
a.id, a.accid, a.status, a.pay_time as payTime, a.create_time as createTime, b.openid, b.amount
mapper.select:
select
from biz_wxpay_bill a left join biz_wx_pay_record b on a.id = b.bill_id inner join biz_wx_user d on b.openid = d.openid
and (a.pay_time between CONCAT(#{startTime},' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(#{endTime},' 23:59:59'))
and a.status = #{payStatus}
and (b.openid = #{openid} or d.phone = #{openid})
ORDER BY a.create_time desc

select a.wxname,a.headImg,d.amount,d.payment_time from biz_wx_user a inner join biz_wx_pay_record d on a.openid = d.openid inner join biz_wxpay_bill c on d.bill_id = c.id
a.extensionAccount = #{openid} and c.accid > 0
and (c.pay_time between CONCAT(#{startTime},' 00:00:00') and CONCAT(#{endTime},' 23:59:59'))
and d.result_code = 'SUCCESS'
ORDER BY d.payment_time desc

select
from biz_wxpay_bill a inner join biz_wx_pay_record b on a.id = b.bill_id WHERE a.status = #{status}

select
from biz_wxpay_bill a inner join biz_wx_pay_record b on a.id = b.bill_id WHERE a.accid = #{accid} and a.status = 1

select
from biz_accident d inner join biz_wxpay_bill a on d.id = a.accid and a.status = 0 inner join biz_wx_pay_record b on a.id = b.bill_id WHERE d.openid = #{openid} ORDER BY a.pay_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into biz_wxpay_bill(accid, status, amount, pay_time, create_time, package_info, out_bill_no) values (#{bizWxpayBill.accid},#{bizWxpayBill.status},#{bizWxpayBill.amount},#{bizWxpayBill.payTime},#{bizWxpayBill.createTime},#{bizWxpayBill.packageInfo},#{bizWxpayBill.outBillNo})
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.amount, b.pay_time AS payTime, a.address AS accidentAddress FROM biz_wxpay_bill b JOIN biz_accident a ON a.id = b.accid WHERE a.openid = #{openid} AND b.status = 0 ORDER BY b.pay_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.amount), 0) FROM biz_wxpay_bill b JOIN biz_accident a ON a.id = b.accid WHERE a.openid = #{openid} AND b.status = 0
